_note: Format based on SHERPA MODELS 2025 paper. May need adjustment after course.
name: sociology_review_session
description: Review-only workflow for citation integrity and schema consistency audits.

states.description: Load generated artifacts and prepare normalized in-memory structures.
Check summary and claims for missing or weak evidence references.
Validate artifact records against JSONSchema definitions.
Detect duplicate claims and inconsistent glossary definitions.
Write markdown and JSON findings into docs/review_reports.
